name: link
title: Link
description: Navigates to another page, view, or site. Native <a>, always underlined, with explicit external-link marking and a visited state driven by the link-visited token.
useWhen: Navigating to another page, view, or document
Pointing to an external website (set the explicit `external` prop)
A standalone navigational call to action (variant "standalone")
avoidWhen: Triggering an in-page action such as submit, open dialog, or delete (use a button)
Expecting external links to be detected from the href — `external` is always explicit
Removing the underline to make a link look like plain text (WCAG 1.4.1: color alone must not convey link-ness)

keyboard: Tab moves focus to the link
Enter activates the link and follows the href
Space does not activate (native <a> contract — it scrolls the page)
Shift+Tab moves focus backwards; no keys are trapped
accessibility.targetSize: Inline links use the WCAG 2.5.8 inline exception; the standalone variant meets the 44px project default (min-h-11)
